channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: 【インタビュー】 米津玄師「夜鷹」 「キングダム 魂の決戦」 主題歌に呼び起こした野心 欲望 https:…

主題歌に呼び起こした野心 欲望
https://natalie.mu/music/pp/yonezukenshi34

#米津玄師 #夜鷹 #キングダム

主題歌に呼び起こした野心 欲望
https://natalie.mu/music/pp/yonezukenshi34

item.title: Noelle Mansbridge thought nothing of her debut ‘P3T’ when sh…
item.author: NME (@nme.com)
item.description:
Noelle Mansbridge thought nothing of her debut ‘P3T’ when she dropped it, until it was used in an animation. As more singles followed, so did fan-made videos, and after her debut's success, she quit college to focus on music.

Femtanyl are on The Cover: nme.com/the-cover/femtanyl-13-07-2026-3956582
item.content:encoded:
Noelle Mansbridge thought nothing of her debut ‘P3T’ when she dropped it, until it was used in an animation. As more singles followed, so did fan-made videos, and after her debut's success, she quit college to focus on music.

Femtanyl are on The Cover: nme.com/the-cover/femtanyl-13-07-2026-3956582

item.title: In 2023, Neill disclosed he had been diagnosed with angioimm…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In 2023, Neill disclosed he had been diagnosed with angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma, a rare type of non-Hodgkin lymphoma. Neill died on Monday in Sydney, according to a statement posted to the actor's social media page. n.pr/44uAeL1
item.content:encoded: In 2023, Neill disclosed he had been diagnosed with angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma, a rare type of non-Hodgkin lymphoma. Neill died on Monday in Sydney, according to a statement posted to the actor's social media page. n.pr/44uAeL1

item.title: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to h…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health. n.pr/4wBVx9g
item.content:encoded: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health. n.pr/4wBVx9g

item.title: The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as "Gus" will go up for a…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as "Gus" will go up for auction on Tuesday. It's not the first time dinosaur bones have been sold to the highest bidder. n.pr/4yxLKTM
item.content:encoded: The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as "Gus" will go up for auction on Tuesday. It's not the first time dinosaur bones have been sold to the highest bidder. n.pr/4yxLKTM

item.title: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters w…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters with personalized text messages, making AI-generated texting conversations the latest tool political campaigns are using to connect.
item.content:encoded: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters with personalized text messages, making AI-generated texting conversations the latest tool political campaigns are using to connect.

item.title: At least two people are dead and at least four people are in…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: At least two people are dead and at least four people are injured after a shooting on Saturday night at a festival celebrating Latin culture in Canada's biggest city. n.pr/4pm1OUu
item.content:encoded: At least two people are dead and at least four people are injured after a shooting on Saturday night at a festival celebrating Latin culture in Canada's biggest city. n.pr/4pm1OUu

item.title: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddie…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddies. The hope is they'll fertilize the crop, be a source of food ... and eat the snails that carry parasitic worms.
item.content:encoded: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddies. The hope is they'll fertilize the crop, be a source of food ... and eat the snails that carry parasitic worms.
